import React, { useState } from "react"; export default function PaymentPage() { const [cardNumber, setCardNumber] = useState(""); const [name, setName] = useState(""); const [expiry, setExpiry] = useState(""); const [cvv, setCvv] = useState(""); const orderSummary = [ { name: "Be Nice Shower Cream, Perfect Elastic Formula, 450 ml", category: "Shower Cream", qty: 1, price: 105.0, img: "/images/shower1.png", }, { name: "Protex Shower Cream, Perfect Elastic Formula, 450 ml", category: "Shower Cream", qty: 2, price: 210.0, img: "/images/shower2.png", }, ]; const subtotal = orderSummary.reduce((acc, item) => acc + item.price * item.qty, 0); return (
{/* Header with steps */}
1 Login
2 Delivery
3 Payment
4 Checkout
{/* Main content */}
{/* Payment Form */}

3. Payment

Payment Details

setCardNumber(e.target.value)} placeholder="1234 5678 9012 3456" className="w-full p-2 border rounded" />
setName(e.target.value)} placeholder="Your Name" className="w-full p-2 border rounded" />
setExpiry(e.target.value)} placeholder="MM/YY" className="w-full p-2 border rounded" />
setCvv(e.target.value)} placeholder="123" className="w-full p-2 border rounded" />
{/* Order Summary */}

Summary Order

{orderSummary.map((item, index) => (

{item.name}

{item.category}

Qty: {item.qty}

${item.price.toFixed(2)}

))}
SubTotal({orderSummary.length} Products) ${subtotal.toFixed(2)}
Delivery (Standard delivery) Free
Total (SubTotal + Delivery) ${subtotal.toFixed(2)}
); }
